  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.146, once a permit expires, the entry must immediately terminate and all entrants must evacuate the space. Work cannot continue until a new permit is issued or the existing permit is formally extended following a complete re-evaluation of the space's atmospheric and physical hazards.",

    "OSHA 1910.146(e)(1)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(e)(5)"
  ]
